caption.full:
Danny McBride is directing the new G.I. JOE movie for Paramount.

The film is set in Springfield, a town secretly controlled by COBRA. McBride co-wrote the script with Jeff Fradley and John Carcieri. He expressed excitement, calling it his childhood passion.

What do you want to see most in this G.I. Joe reboot?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #GIJoe #DannyMcBride #Cobra
caption.firstComment: I’m here for this—gotta love the cartoons and go for a fun, over-the-top take. What’s your dream cast for the team?

youtube.title: Danny McBride Directs G.I. JOE: "Stoked About It"
youtube.description:
Danny McBride is directing Paramount Pictures' upcoming G.I. JOE movie, co-writing the script with Jeff Fradley and John Carcieri. The film is set in Springfield, a town secretly controlled by COBRA. McBride stated, "It was definitely the cartoons and the comics. G.I. Joe was my thing when I was a kid." He also mentioned, "We have some pretty interesting people lining up to be in it, too."

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/movies/danny-mcbride-set-to-direct-paramount-s-new-g-i-joe-movie/
